title: Resazurin Viability Assay for Human Primary T Cells in 96-Well Format
author: Bulent Arman Aksoy
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.quwdwxe

steps.title: Add 10X dye for each well...
steps.instruction: Add 10X dye for each well using a multichannel pipettor (so, for 200 ul you will be adding 20 ul of the 10X solution)

steps.title: Continue culturing the cells the same...
steps.instruction: Continue culturing the cells the same way for 24 hours 24:00:00

steps.title: Use a plate reader to measure...
steps.instruction: Use a plate reader to measure the absorbance at both 570 nm and 595 nm (BIO-RAD, 1681130)

steps.title: Subtract your 595 nm measurement from...
steps.instruction: Subtract your 595 nm measurement from the 570 nm for each well

steps.title: Then (optionally) subtract your blank media...
steps.instruction: Then (optionally) subtract your blank media measurement from your treatment measurements

steps.title: The number you end up is...
steps.instruction: The number you end up is directly proportional to the number of cells in the well.
